selection_surface: question-time de-vigged 1X2 market probability gap between top1 and top2
historical_reference_warning: Threshold 0.30 was identified from retrospective closing averages and then tested without retuning on retrospective opening averages. Neither opening nor closing references have original quote timestamps, so they cannot authorize formal promotion.

NOR_Eliteserien.reason: No opening reference market rows were available, so arbitrary question-time timing robustness is unproven.

SCO_Premiership.reason: Fixed 0.30 opening accuracy fell below 70%; threshold was not changed.

non_candidate_domains.SUI_SuperLeague: retrospective gap>=0.30 accuracy below 0.70 and selected sample small
non_candidate_domains.JPN_J1: retrospective gap>=0.30 accuracy about 0.697 on only 33 matches
non_candidate_domains.NED_Eredivisie: proper-score market advantage did not pass strict bootstrap gate
non_candidate_domains.BRA_SerieA: proper-score market advantage did not pass strict bootstrap gate
non_candidate_domains.ARG_Primera: proper-score market advantage did not pass strict bootstrap gate

runtime_shadow_policy: Only ESP_LaLiga, POR_PrimeiraLiga and GER_Bundesliga are registered for arbitrary question-time selective shadow evaluation. When a future V5.2.3 snapshot passes and de-vigged 1X2 gap >=0.30, record SHADOW_MARKET_HIGH_CONFIDENCE_DIRECTION using market Top-1. NOR and SCO are disabled for arbitrary-time runtime shadow until independent timing evidence exists. Never replace the formal CURRENT direction or alter the formal matrix without later prospective validation and CURRENT-authorized promotion.
